title: Requirement Specification
description: Schema for a single requirement spec. Every requirement MUST declare measurable success criteria and a validation mechanism so downstream generation stays controlled and traceable.

id.description: Stable requirement identifier, threaded through code, tests and eval rubric.

success_criteria.description: Measurable, testable definitions of done. At least one required.

id.description: Acceptance-criterion id, unique within the requirement.

statement.description: Measurable criterion, e.g. 'Returns 400 for missing fields'.

measure.description: How the criterion is quantified (metric, threshold, expected value).

validation_mechanism.description: How the success criteria are verified. At least one required.

type.description: Kind of validation. 'manual' alone is discouraged for gating.

ref.description: Pointer to the validator: test path, check id, or eval rubric id.

criteria_ids.description: Which success_criteria ids this mechanism validates.

downstream_artifacts.description: Generated artifacts that trace back to this requirement.
